LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT COAST NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILS TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OR PRODUCTION. THE FACTS SHOW THAT THERE IS A DISPUTED ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT REGARDING WHETHER DEFENDANT BREACHED THE CONTRACT AND/OR ACTED IN BAD FAITH. THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT MADE AN EFFORT TO RESOLVE ALL OF THE CLAIMS AND THE TRIER OF FACT WILL DETERMINE WHETHER DEFENDANT WAS REASONABLE WHEN IT DEFERRED TO THE CRIMINAL ATTORNEY'S INSTRUCTIONS NOT TO CONTACT THE INJURED PARTIES AND COMPROMISE THE CLAIMS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =302/LN

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MICHAEL S. DANKO OF DANKO/MEREDITH, TEL. NO. (650) 453-3600 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. EUGENIA CHERIN OF BECHERER KANNETT & SCHWEITZER, TEL. NO. (510) 658-3600 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT COAST NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Defendant fails to shift the burden or production. The facts show that there is a disputed issue of material fact regarding whether defendant breached the contract and/or acted in bad faith. There is no evidence that defendant made an effort to resolve all of the claims and the trier of fact will determine whether defendant was reasonable when it deferred to the criminal attorney's instructions not to contact the injured parties and compromise the claims. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/LN
